title: metastelma angustifolium
intro: Metastelma angustifolium is a perennial plant species, also known as the "Milk Vine" or "Purple Milk Vine", belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metastelma angustifolium include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Metastelma angustifolium can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
